# Bug Report

## Problem

Describe the problem.

## File / Section

Which file or section is affected?

## Mode Affected

- [ ] Quick Check
- [ ] Focused Review
- [ ] Full Studio Audit
- [ ] Reference loading / token usage
- [ ] Not sure

## Expected Behavior

What should happen?

## Actual Behavior

What happens instead?

## Suggested Fix

What change would solve or reduce the issue?

## Screenshots / Examples

Add screenshots, prompts, outputs, or examples if useful.
